response.reasoning: Step 1 — Experience length: Career starts circa 2006 (freelance) or 2009 (first formal employment), putting total professional experience at 16–20 years, clearing the 15-year minimum. Step 2 — Seniority alignment: Most titles are 'Senior' or 'Staff' Software Developer; the role targets a director-level individual contributor. No evidence of org-wide technical leadership, executive advising, or strategy ownership. Step 3 — AI relevance: The only AI-specific work appears in the most recent role (April 2025–present) at re:cinq — AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. This is promising but very shallow in timeline and depth relative to a 'Principal AI Strategy' mandate. Step 4 — Cloud depth: AWS CDK appears at Optilyz but is not a sustained focus. No cloud architecture, cloud platform strategy, or hyperscaler advisory experience. Step 5 — Education: BS in Computer Science (MIT, 2009–2012) meets minimum; no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field. The overlapping degrees (MIT CS and Romanian Fine Arts, both 2009) are an unexplained anomaly. Step 6 — Entrepreneurial signal: GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, founder since 2016) and early startup work (WatchUp, Apon) show builder initiative. Step 7 — Thought leadership: Workshop facilitation and a conference talk exist but are narrow in scope and not positioned at an industry-influencing level. Step 8 — Strategic advisory: No evidence of advising enterprise customers, engaging with partners at a strategic level, or shaping product/platform direction beyond a team scope. Conclusion: strong hands-on engineering pedigree, insufficient AI depth and strategic seniority for this role.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on software engineering across diverse stacks and domains demonstrates the breadth the role requires at a minimum
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing proactive entry into the AI ecosystem
Founder of GISCollective and early startup contributions (WatchUp, Apon) evidence entrepreneurial builder instinct
concerns: AI experience is limited to approximately 14 months and appears implementation-level, not the multi-year strategic AI product leadership the role expects
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, which is a preferred qualifier and common baseline at this seniority tier
No demonstrated experience advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud platform strategy, or operating at a director-equivalent IC scope
response.justification: Bogdan brings a long, credible engineering career with genuine breadth and a recent hands-on entry into AI tooling, but the role requires sustained, recognized AI expertise, the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers, and director-level influence — none of which are demonstrated in the résumé. The AI work is too recent and too narrow, the seniority signals stop at staff-level hands-on contribution, and there is no evidence of the thought-leadership or customer-advisory dimension central to this position.
